about.hero_title: About Nordic Digital - Denmark's App & Web Agency
about.hero_desc: A Danish digital agency focused on apps, websites and visibility
about.story_p1: Nordic Digital is an ambitious Danish tech agency based in Copenhagen. We specialize in helping businesses build their digital presence through professional app development, web design and SEO.
about.story_p2: Our team combines solid expertise in software development, design and technology. We master both the creative side of digital product development and the technical implementation - from idea to finished app and website.
about.story_p3: We believe that professional digital development should be accessible to businesses of all sizes. That's why we offer transparent prices, quality solutions and personal service to every customer.
about.story_p4: With a sharp focus on the latest technologies like React Native, Flutter and modern web frameworks, we ensure that our customers always have the best digital solutions. Your success is our mission.
about.mission_desc: To democratize digital development by delivering professional apps and websites at fair prices. We combine technical expertise with creative design to create solutions that work.
about.vision_desc: To be the preferred tech partner for ambitious businesses seeking growth through quality apps and digital presence.
about.value1_desc: Clear communication and no hidden costs. We report continuously and you always have full overview of your investment.
about.value2_desc: Everything we do is data-driven and measured on concrete KPIs. We focus on ROI and real business value.
about.value3_desc: We see ourselves as an extension of your team. Your success is our success, and we invest in every collaboration.
about.value4_desc: We constantly stay updated on the latest trends and technologies to ensure your competitive advantage.
about.cta_desc: Let's have a chat about how we can help your business

apps.title: App development
apps.subtitle: Professional app development for Danish businesses. We are a Danish app agency that builds iOS and Android apps with React Native and Flutter.

apps.faq2_a: A simple MVP app can be developed in 4-8 weeks. A full business app typically takes 3-6 months depending on complexity.
apps.faq3_q: Do I get apps for both iOS and Android?

apps.cta_desc: Book a free consultation and let's talk about your project

seo_service.title: SEO Agency Denmark - Professional Search Engine Optimization
seo_service.desc: Be visible on Google and get more customers organically. We help Danish businesses rank higher through technical SEO, on-page optimization and quality link building.
seo_service.features_title: What's included in our SEO package?
seo_service.feature1_desc: Complete review of your website's technical health. We identify and fix errors holding you back.
seo_service.feature2_desc: We find the keywords your customers use. Focus on Danish searches with high potential and manageable competition.
seo_service.feature3_desc: Optimization of titles, meta descriptions, headings, content and internal links for maximum visibility.
seo_service.feature4_desc: Quality links from relevant Danish websites that strengthen your authority and rankings.
seo_service.feature5_desc: Optimization for local searches, Google Business Profile and local citations for businesses with physical presence.
seo_service.feature6_desc: Detailed reports with rankings, traffic and progress. You always have full overview of your results.
seo_service.process_step1_desc: We analyze your website and competitors to identify opportunities.
seo_service.process_step2_desc: We develop a customized SEO strategy with clear goals and priorities.
seo_service.process_step3_desc: We optimize your website and start the link building work.
seo_service.process_step4_desc: Continuous monitoring, adjustment and improvement of your SEO.
seo_service.faq1_question: What's included in SEO at Nordic Digital?
seo_service.faq1_answer: Our SEO service includes technical SEO audit, keyword research, on-page optimization, link building and monthly reporting. Contact us for a customized quote based on your needs.
seo_service.faq2_question: How long does it take to see SEO results?
seo_service.faq2_answer: SEO is a long-term investment. Typically you see the first improvements after 3-6 months, with significant results after 6-12 months. The timeline depends on competition in your industry and your website's current state.
seo_service.faq3_question: What's the difference between SEO and GEO?
seo_service.faq3_answer: SEO optimizes your website for traditional search engines like Google. GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) optimizes your content for AI search engines like ChatGPT and Perplexity. Nordic Digital offers both as a combined service.
seo_service.faq4_question: Do you offer SEO throughout Denmark?
seo_service.faq4_answer: Yes, Nordic Digital offers SEO services to businesses throughout Denmark. We work with customers in Copenhagen, Aarhus, Odense, Aalborg and all other Danish cities. Our digital services can be delivered regardless of location.
seo_service.cta_title: Ready to rank higher on Google?
seo_service.cta_desc: Book a free SEO analysis and get concrete recommendations for your website

app_service.title: App Development Denmark - iOS & Android Apps
app_service.desc: We develop professional apps for iOS and Android. With modern technologies like React Native and Flutter, you get apps that work on both platforms for one price.
app_service.features_title: What do you get with app development from Nordic Digital?
app_service.feature1_desc: One codebase for both iOS and Android - save time and money without compromising on quality.
app_service.feature2_desc: We use React Native and Flutter - the most popular frameworks for professional app development.
app_service.feature3_desc: Your apps run with native performance and feel like real iOS and Android apps.
app_service.feature4_desc: We build or integrate with your existing backend, APIs and databases.
app_service.feature5_desc: We help you all the way to App Store and Google Play - including setup and publishing.
app_service.feature6_desc: After launch, we offer support, updates and maintenance of your app.
app_service.tech_desc: We choose the right technology for your project
app_service.tech_react: Perfect for apps that need to work on both platforms. JavaScript-based with large community.
app_service.tech_flutter: Google's framework with fast performance and beautiful animations.
app_service.tech_ios: Swift and SwiftUI for apps only for iPhone and iPad.
app_service.tech_android: Kotlin for native Android apps with full access to platform features.
app_service.types_desc: We have experience with many different app types
app_service.type1_desc: Internal tools, CRM, project management and workflow apps
app_service.type2_desc: Webshop apps with payment, order management and inventory
app_service.type3_desc: Community apps, messaging and social networks
app_service.type4_desc: Tracking apps, booking systems and health apps
app_service.faq_title: Frequently Asked Questions about App Development
app_service.faq1_question: What's included in app development at Nordic Digital?
app_service.faq1_answer: We offer complete app development from idea to launch. This includes design, development, testing, and publishing on App Store and Google Play. Contact us for a customized quote.
app_service.faq2_question: How long does it take to develop an app?
app_service.faq2_answer: A simple MVP app can be developed in 4-8 weeks. A full business app typically takes 3-6 months depending on scope and complexity.
app_service.faq3_question: Do you make apps for both iOS and Android?
app_service.faq3_answer: Yes, we develop apps for both iOS and Android. We primarily use cross-platform technologies like React Native and Flutter, which gives you apps for both platforms for one price.
app_service.faq4_question: What happens after the app is launched?
app_service.faq4_answer: We offer ongoing support, bug fixes and updates after launch. We can also help with new features and optimization based on user data.
app_service.cta_desc: Book a free consultation and let's talk about your app project

webdesign_service.title: Web Design Agency Denmark - Professional Websites
webdesign_service.desc: Your website is your digital business card. We build modern, fast and conversion-optimized websites for businesses throughout Denmark.
webdesign_service.features_title: What do you get with a website from Nordic Digital?
webdesign_service.feature1_desc: Your website looks great on all devices - desktop, tablet and mobile.
webdesign_service.feature2_desc: Optimized websites that load quickly and score high on Google PageSpeed.
webdesign_service.feature3_desc: Built with SEO in mind from the start - correct structure, meta tags and schema markup.
webdesign_service.feature4_desc: HTTPS security included - important for both users and Google ranking.
webdesign_service.feature5_desc: Google Analytics and conversion tracking so you can follow your visitors.
webdesign_service.feature6_desc: Professional contact form that sends leads directly to your inbox.
webdesign_service.cities_desc: We create websites for businesses across the country
webdesign_service.faq_title: Frequently Asked Questions about Web Design
webdesign_service.faq1_question: How much does a website cost in Denmark?
webdesign_service.faq1_answer: A professional website from Nordic Digital starts from 5,000 DKK for a landing page. A full business website typically costs 10,000-25,000 DKK depending on scope and functionality.
webdesign_service.faq2_question: How long does it take to make a website?
webdesign_service.faq2_answer: A simple landing page can be made in 1-2 weeks. A full business website typically takes 3-6 weeks, depending on scope and how quickly we get feedback and content.
webdesign_service.faq3_answer: Yes, all our websites are SEO-optimized from the start. This includes technical SEO, fast load time, mobile-friendly design and correct structure with meta tags and schema markup.
webdesign_service.faq4_question: Can you make websites for restaurants?
webdesign_service.faq4_answer: Yes, we have experience with websites for restaurants and cafes. We can integrate online menus, table booking, Google Maps and Google Business Profile.
webdesign_service.cta_desc: Book a free consultation and let's talk about your project

facebook_service_deprecated.faq2_answer: Yes, Facebook and Instagram are still among the most effective advertising platforms with over 3.5 million Danish users. Meta's advanced targeting makes it possible to reach exactly your target audience.
facebook_service_deprecated.faq3_question: How much should I spend on Facebook ads?
facebook_service_deprecated.faq3_answer: We recommend a minimum advertising budget of 3,000-5,000 DKK/month to get enough data for optimization. The optimal budget depends on your goals and industry.
facebook_service_deprecated.faq4_question: Can you help with Instagram advertising?
facebook_service_deprecated.faq4_answer: Yes, Instagram and Facebook Ads are managed through the same platform (Meta). We optimize campaigns for both platforms and choose the best placements based on your target audience.
facebook_service_deprecated.cta_title: Ready to reach more customers on social media?
facebook_service_deprecated.cta_desc: Book a free consultation and let's create a strategy for your business
